crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: nightly-metrics
crons.prompt: FIRST: cortextos bus update-cron-fire nightly-metrics --interval 24h. THEN: Run nightly metrics collection: cortextos bus collect-metrics. Review the output and report any anomalies via Telegram to the orchestrator.

crons.name: auto-commit
crons.prompt: FIRST: cortextos bus update-cron-fire auto-commit --interval 24h. THEN: Read .claude/skills/local-version-control/SKILL.md and execute the daily version control workflow. Stage, review, and commit changes.

crons.name: check-upstream
crons.prompt: FIRST: cortextos bus update-cron-fire check-upstream --interval 24h. THEN: Read .claude/skills/upstream-sync/SKILL.md and execute the upstream sync workflow. Check for framework updates and report to the orchestrator.

crons.name: catalog-browse
crons.prompt: FIRST: cortextos bus update-cron-fire catalog-browse --interval 7d. THEN: Read .claude/skills/catalog-browse/SKILL.md and execute the catalog browse workflow. Check for new community skills and recommend useful ones.

crons.name: theta-wave
crons.prompt: FIRST: cortextos bus update-cron-fire theta-wave --interval 24h. THEN: Read .claude/skills/theta-wave/SKILL.md. Initiate the theta wave cycle. First action: message the orchestrator that theta wave is starting and share your initial system scan.
